title: The Strait of Hormuz is facing a blockade. These countries will be most impacted
summary_full: A closure of the Strait of Hormuz would send shockwaves through global energy markets, but the pain would be felt most acutely in Asia.
summary_public: A closure of the Strait of Hormuz would send shockwaves through global energy markets, but the pain would be felt most acutely in Asia.
